LineComment.Text: Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Check position Axis01_X to release the powermeter
Blocking Axis01_X if Powermeter is in measuring position
Disable Powemeter Key[1] if not Jog Mode

StructuredText.Text: Powermeter in work position move request

LineComment.Text: WFA Garder Sta_Meas_1 ? // Station 1 in measure area

StructuredText.Text: Powermeter in home position move request
Compute CM (" Tol+" - " Tol-" ) / (6 Sigma) process capability index
